reviews.review_description:
I love this game and have been using it to prep for fencing tryouts , you can easily Wil by hitting their sword upward and getting them in the stomach and it seems to be a bug 
because they never defend
With the latest updates, the club has already become an exciting forum for fencing. I trust they will continue to develop their app to make it a full featured sport.

reviews.review_title: double vision/ do not want to give low
reviews.review_description: I just installed this game on meta quest 3 and I am seeing double vision.  I close one eye it is fine.  I will try to uninstall and install it again, but not sure if it is the game or down load.  I am not wanting to give low stars but not sure what else to do.

developer_response.body: Just released an update that may have fixed the issue.
